headline: Dell: A Value Stock Multiple On An AI Growth Business
summary: Dell Technologies ended last quarter with $43B in backlog, and management guided FY2027 AI server revenue of roughly $50B. Click here for more on DELL stock.

headline: Corning Stock Is Falling. Why J.P. Morgan Disagrees With the ‘Blue-Sky Scenario.’
summary: Shares of  Corning  declined Thursday after  J.P. Morgan  analysts downgraded the artificial-intelligence beneficiary with the firm cautious heading into earnings.  A J.P. Morgan analyst team, led by Samik Chatterjee, downgraded  Corning  to Neutral from Overweight.  The firm, however, raised its price target on Corning stock to $175 from $115.

headline: Jensen Huang Reveals Nvidia's Unique All-In Investment Approach: 'We Don't Pick Winners'
summary: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang says the company backs a wide range of AI firms, stressing it doesn't pick winners but supports the entire ecosystem.
